Related Entities

  • hospital ECU HEALTH MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital WALTER B JONES CENTER LAKESIDE PSYCHIATRIC HOSPITA
  • snf Macgregor Downs Health Center by Harborview 2-star, 152 beds
  • snf Greenville Health and Rehabilitation Center 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf East Carolina Health and Rehabilitation Center 2-star, 130 beds
  • snf PruittHealth-Farmville 2-star, 56 beds
  • snf Ayden Court Nursing and Rehabilitation Center 3-star, 82 beds
  • snf Cypress Glen Retirement Community 5-star, 6 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
